solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def divisorGame(self, n: int) -> bool:
        return n % 2 == 0
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The key insight is that Alice wins if and only if n is even, because she can always make a move that leaves Bob with an odd number, forcing Bob to leave her with an even number, and so on, until Bob is left with no moves.
